summary: Kimi Antonelli surged past Lewis Hamilton in the closing laps of a chaotic Monaco Grand Prix, capitalizing on two safety car periods and a red flag to secure his maiden victory. Hamilton, second across the line, reflected on his performance with frustration, saying he "feels like I'm having to remind people who I am." The result marks a significant shift in the championship picture, with Antonelli's breakthrough win establishing him as a genuine title contender.
